formula_cell: phylo(1 | species, tree = tree) in sigma
allowed_hosts: local n=5 route smoke after contract; Totoro/FIIA only after local pass and review
blocked_hosts: Totoro/FIIA before local smoke pass; Nibi/Rorqual/DRAC before reviewed local smoke and retained-denominator design
stop_rule: Stop if target inventory misses sd:sigma:phylo(1 | species), fit fails, convergence fails, pdHess is false, sdreport covariance is unavailable, Wald status is wald_unavailable, boundary or wald_at_boundary rows are dropped instead of retained, endpoint profile errors are dropped instead of retained, finite-subset coverage is used as retained coverage, one-sided misses are missing, small_sample_df or bias_correct is not none, or any support-cell status changes.
claim_boundary: Gaussian low-q q1 sigma-intercept route contract only; this promotes exactly no Q-Series row; it does not change fit_status, interval_status, coverage_status, inference_ready, supported, location-axis bias+t correction, q1 mu, matched mu+sigma, q2, q4/q8, non-Gaussian, REML, AI-REML, broad bridge support, or public support.
next_gate: Write/run a local n=5 direct sigma-SD smoke with raw Wald intervals pinned to small_sample_df=none and bias_correct=none plus endpoint-profile diagnostics; retain all attempted rows, boundary rows, profile failures, one-sided misses, and warnings; require Fisher/Gauss/Rose review before Totoro/FIIA, Nibi/Rorqual, denominator, or status work.
